choose.when: AND (u.dept_id = #{deptId} OR u.dept_id IN (SELECT dept_id FROM sys_dept WHERE find_in_set(#{deptId}, ancestors) > 0))

mapper.sql: select r.report_id, r.report_date, r.user_id, r.dept_id, r.total_work_hours, r.del_flag, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(dd_l.entry_type, ':', dd_l.leave_hours) SEPARATOR ',') FROM pm_daily_report_detail dd_l WHERE dd_l.report_id = r.report_id AND dd_l.entry_type != 'work' AND dd_l.del_flag = '0') AS leave_summary, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark, u.nick_name, d.dept_name from pm_daily_report r left join sys_user u on r.user_id = u.user_id left join sys_dept d on r.dept_id = d.dept_id

select r.report_id, r.report_date, r.user_id, r.dept_id, r.total_work_hours, r.del_flag, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark, u.nick_name, d.dept_name, dd.detail_id as detail_detail_id, dd.report_id as detail_report_id, dd.project_id as detail_project_id, dd.project_stage as detail_project_stage, dd.work_hours as detail_work_hours, dd.work_content as detail_work_content, dd.del_flag as detail_del_flag, dd.create_by as detail_create_by, dd.create_time as detail_create_time, dd.update_by as detail_update_by, dd.update_time as detail_update_time, dd.remark as detail_remark, p.project_name as detail_project_name, p.project_code as detail_project_code, dict.dict_label as detail_stage_name, p.estimated_workload as detail_estimated_workload, ROUND(p.actual_workload / 8, 3) + COALESCE(p.adjust_workload, 0) as detail_actual_workload, p.revenue_confirm_year as detail_revenue_confirm_year, dd.entry_type as detail_entry_type, dd.leave_hours as detail_leave_hours, dd.sub_project_id as detail_sub_project_id, dd.work_category as detail_work_category, sp.task_name as detail_sub_project_name, sp.task_code as detail_sub_project_task_code, pb.batch_no as detail_sub_project_batch_no, sp.task_stage as detail_sub_project_stage, sp.task_manager_id as detail_sub_project_manager_id, su.nick_name as detail_sub_project_manager_name, pu.nick_name as detail_project_manager_name, sp.estimated_workload as detail_sub_project_estimated_workload, ROUND(sp.actual_workload / 8, 3) as detail_sub_project_actual_workload from pm_daily_report r left join sys_user u on r.user_id = u.user_id left join sys_dept d on r.dept_id = d.dept_id left join pm_daily_report_detail dd on r.report_id = dd.report_id left join pm_project p on dd.project_id = p.project_id left join pm_task sp on dd.sub_project_id = sp.task_id left join pm_production_batch pb on sp.batch_id = pb.batch_id left join sys_user su on sp.task_manager_id = su.user_id and su.del_flag = '0' left join sys_user pu on p.project_manager_id = pu.user_id and pu.del_flag = '0' left join sys_dict_data dict on dd.project_stage COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = dict.dict_value and dict.dict_type = 'sys_xmjd'

sql.if: and (r.dept_id = #{deptId} or r.dept_id in (select dept_id from sys_dept where find_in_set(#{deptId}, ancestors) > 0))

and exists ( select 1 from pm_daily_report_detail dd_filter inner join pm_project p_filter on dd_filter.project_id = p_filter.project_id where dd_filter.report_id = r.report_id and dd_filter.del_flag = '0' and p_filter.project_name like concat('%', #{projectName}, '%') )

and exists ( select 1 from pm_daily_report_detail dd_pid where dd_pid.report_id = r.report_id and dd_pid.del_flag = '0' and (dd_pid.project_id = #{projectId} or dd_pid.project_id in (select project_id from pm_project where parent_id = #{projectId} and del_flag = '0')) )

mapper.insert:
insert into pm_daily_report
report_date, user_id, dept_id, total_work_hours, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark,
#{reportDate}, #{userId}, #{deptId}, #{totalWorkHours}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark},
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM pm_daily_report WHERE report_id in
#{reportId}
mapper.select:
select u.user_id as userId, u.nick_name as nickName, d.dept_name as deptName from sys_user u left join sys_dept d on u.dept_id = d.dept_id
u.del_flag = '0' and u.status = '0' and u.user_id not in (select user_id from pm_daily_report_whitelist where del_flag = '0')
and ( u.user_id in ( select project_manager_id from pm_project where project_id = #{projectId} and del_flag = '0' union select team_leader_id from pm_project where project_id = #{projectId} and del_flag = '0' and team_leader_id is not null union select user_id from pm_project_member where project_id = #{projectId} and is_active = '1' and del_flag = '0' ) )
and (u.dept_id = #{deptId} or u.dept_id in (select dept_id from sys_dept where find_in_set(#{deptId}, ancestors) > 0))
${params.dataScope}
order by d.dept_name, u.nick_name

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id
u.del_flag = '0' AND u.status = '0' AND u.user_id != 1 AND u.user_id NOT IN (SELECT user_id FROM pm_daily_report_whitelist WHERE del_flag = '0')
AND u.user_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT pm.user_id FROM pm_project_member pm INNER JOIN pm_project p_pn ON pm.project_id = p_pn.project_id WHERE pm.is_active = '1' AND pm.del_flag = '0' AND p_pn.del_flag = '0' AND p_pn.project_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{projectName}, '%') )
${params.dataScope}

SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.nick_name COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AS nickName, d.dept_name AS deptName FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id
u.del_flag = '0' AND u.status = '0' AND u.user_id != 1 AND u.user_id NOT IN (SELECT user_id FROM pm_daily_report_whitelist WHERE del_flag = '0') AND u.user_id NOT IN ( SELECT r.user_id FROM pm_daily_report r WHERE r.report_date = #{reportDate} AND r.del_flag = '0' )
AND u.user_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT pm.user_id FROM pm_project_member pm INNER JOIN pm_project p_pn ON pm.project_id = p_pn.project_id WHERE pm.is_active = '1' AND pm.del_flag = '0' AND p_pn.del_flag = '0' AND p_pn.project_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{projectName}, '%') )
${params.dataScope}
ORDER BY d.dept_name, u.nick_name COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci

SELECT DISTINCT p.project_id AS projectId, p.project_name AS projectName FROM pm_project p INNER JOIN pm_project_member m ON m.project_id = p.project_id AND m.is_active = '1' AND m.del_flag = '0' INNER JOIN sys_user u ON u.user_id = m.user_id INNER JOIN sys_dept d ON d.dept_id = u.dept_id
p.del_flag = '0'
AND (p.project_dept = #{deptId} OR p.project_dept IN ( SELECT dept_id FROM sys_dept WHERE FIND_IN_SET(#{deptId}, ancestors) > 0 ))
AND p.project_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{projectName}, '%')
${params.dataScope}
ORDER BY p.project_name COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci LIMIT 20

SELECT d.dept_id AS deptId, CASE WHEN (LENGTH(d.ancestors) - LENGTH(REPLACE(d.ancestors, ',', ''))) = 2 THEN 0 ELSE d.parent_id END AS parentId, d.dept_name AS deptName, d.ancestors, d.order_num AS orderNum FROM sys_dept d WHERE d.del_flag = '0' AND d.status = '0' AND (LENGTH(d.ancestors) - LENGTH(REPLACE(d.ancestors, ',', ''))) >= 2 ${params.dataScope} ORDER BY d.parent_id, d.order_num
